name: Bonfires Memory
description: Connects OpenClaw agents to Bonfires memory for context-aware retrieval, capture, and ingestion.

baseUrl.description: Bonfires API base URL. Env fallback: BONFIRES_BASE_URL.

apiKeyEnv.description: Name of the environment variable holding the Bonfires API key. Env fallback: BONFIRES_API_KEY_ENV.

bonfireId.description: Bonfire workspace ID. Env fallback: BONFIRE_ID.

agents.description: Mapping of local agent IDs to Bonfires agent IDs. At least one string mapping is required.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of search results to return per query.

intervalMinutes.description: Interval between stack processing heartbeat ticks in minutes. Also determines inactivity close timeout (2x interval).

strictHostedMode.description: When true, plugin will throw if hosted API credentials are missing instead of falling back to mock client.

systemGuidance.description: Stable Bonfires guidance injected into prependSystemContext when configured. Leave unset to preserve legacy prependContext-only behavior.

everyMinutes.description: Interval between ingestion scans in minutes.

rootDir.description: Root directory for legacy ingestion scan. Deprecated: use profiles instead.

ledgerPath.description: Path for the ingestion hash ledger. Relative paths resolved by plugin.

summaryPath.description: Path for the ingestion run summary. Relative paths resolved by plugin.

profiles.description: Named ingestion target profiles. Each profile defines rootDir, includeGlobs, excludeGlobs, and extensions.

rootDir.description: Root directory for this profile's content scan.

includeGlobs.description: Glob patterns for files to include (relative to rootDir). Defaults to ['**/*'].

excludeGlobs.description: Glob patterns for files to exclude. Defaults to ['**/node_modules/**', '**/.git/**', '**/.openclaw/**'].

extensions.description: File extensions to include. Defaults to ['.md'].

agentProfiles.description: Mapping of agent IDs to profile names for agent-specific ingestion targets.

defaultProfile.description: Default profile name used when an agent has no explicit mapping in agentProfiles.

maxUrlsPerRun.description: Maximum number of explicitly approved URLs that may be executed in one session-bound ingestion run.

stateDir.description: Directory for plugin runtime state files (heartbeat state, capture ledger). Empty/whitespace values are normalized to .bonfires-state/.

enabled.description: Enable public-web link discovery for later user approval.

maxCandidates.description: Maximum discovery candidates returned per query.
